subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Infinite bounties are all-embracing and the merciful bestowals are perfect in this most glorious age [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی فیوضات نامتناهی شاملست و الطاف رحمانی کامل در این عصر جلیل اکبر
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds
